agent_trace.summary: [已完成] OCR提取完成，1955财年最高支出部门为Defense Department，金额35532百万美元
agent_trace.raw_tail:
nterior, 
# 6:Justice, 7:Labor, 8:PostOffice, 9:State, 10:Treasury-Interest-Debt, 11:Treasury-Interest-Refunds, 12:Other, 13:DC

dept_1955 = {
    "Defense Department (Military)": 35532,
    "Defense Department (Civil)": 548,
    "Defense Department (Other)": 1993,
    "Health, Education, Welfare": 515,
    "Interior": 182,
    "Justice": 394,
    "Labor": 356,
    "Post Office": 136,
    "State": 6370,
    "Treasury (Interest on Debt)": 62,
    "Treasury (Interest on Refunds)": 368,
    "Other": 22
}

# 找最高支出部门
max_dept = max(dept_1955.items(), key=lambda x: x[1])
print("=== 1955 FY Department Spending (millions $) ===")
for dept, amount in sorted(dept_1955.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
    print(f"{dept}: ${amount:,}")

print(f"\n=== Highest Spending Department ===")
print(f"Department: {max_dept[0]}")
print(f"Amount: {max_dept[1]} million nominal dollars")

# 题目问的是 "U.S Federal Department"，Defense Department 是支出最高的
# 答案: 35532
